entries.content: plural noun ① (expression of gratitude) 感谢 gǎnxiè▸ a letter of thanks 感谢信 ② (allocating responsibility) 由于 yóuyú▸ thanks to sth/sb; 多亏了某事物/某人

entries.content: exclamation 谢谢 xièxie▸ thanks a lot 多谢▸ no thanks 不用了，谢谢
